---
title: "About"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: profile.jpeg
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/Atika-Syeda
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/atika-syeda-73a556171/
    - text: Google scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=AebpXJgAAAAJ&hl=en
---

I am a PhD student at Johns Hopkins-HHMI Janelia Research Campus as part of the joint graduate program. My research interests lie at the intersection of neuroscience and AI (machine learning). Check out my projects to learn more about my work.


## Education

Johns Hopkins University, HHMI Janelia Research Campus | MD/VA, USA
PhD in Neuroscience |  2022 - Present

University of Oxford | Oxford, UK
MSc in Neuroscience |  2019 - 2020

University of Calgary | Calgary, Canada
BHSc in Bioinformatics | 2015 - 2019


## Experience

HHMI Janelia Research Campus | Research/Software consultant | 2019 - 2022
